quickDraw.presetUnavailable: Quick-draw preset is not available in the current configuration.
quickDraw.shapeUnavailable: Quick-draw shape is not enabled for this viewer.
quickDraw.noPreset: No annotation preset available to draw with.

display.title: Display
display.measurementLabelsHint: Floats each annotation's area or length above it. Automatically hidden while more than {{count}} annotations are visible.

viewerMenu.title: Annotations
viewerMenu.leftClickPreset: Left mouse button paints this class
viewerMenu.rightClickPreset: Right mouse button paints this class

workspace.label: Workspace
workspace.outsideWarning: Annotations can only be drawn inside the active workspace.
workspace.lockedHint: Select a region workspace to annotate it.

errors.noPresetSelect: No annotation class is selected. Pick one here to start annotating.
errors.autoCreateFail: Could not create the automatic annotation. Make sure you are detecting in the correct layer and selecting a coloured area. Adjusting the threshold can also help.
errors.autoOutlineInvisibleLayer: The chosen layer is not visible: the auto-outline method will not work.
errors.metaCreateFail: Failed to create the metadata field "{{name}}".
errors.metaDeleteFail: Failed to delete the metadata field.
errors.metaNameRequired: You must enter a name for the new field.

tutorial.title: Annotations
tutorial.description: Draw, save and share annotations on the slide.
tutorial.openPanel: Open the Annotations tab on the right edge to access the toolbar, the class presets and the annotation list.
tutorial.enable: Toggle the whole annotations layer on/off — this also disables drawing hotkeys, so you can pan freely without accidental strokes.
tutorial.settings: Open display settings to adjust outline-only mode and the border width and opacity of annotations.
tutorial.canvas: Drawing happens directly on the slide: pick a class preset, then click-drag to outline a region. Right-click an annotation to copy / move / delete it. Hotkeys are listed under More options in the toolbar.

export.description: Annotations can be uploaded to a server, or downloaded using local files. For files, a desired format can be imported or exported.
export.autoFormatHint: Detect format from the file name and content. Export requires a concrete format.
export.autoExportHint: Pick a concrete format above to export. Auto detect is only used on import.
export.lossyDefaultHint: This format is lossy — some annotation data may not be preserved on re-import.
export.downloadFallbackHandled: Annotations downloaded as a file - no service integration available.

comments.title: Comments
comments.autoOpen: Automatically open comments on initial click

measurements.title: Metrics
measurements.helperText: Area in unit², length in unit (aggregate per preset).
measurements.intensityHelper: Pick a preset, then click Run. We sample what the standalone visualization renders inside each annotation and report mean / median / % above threshold.
measurements.componentsHelperShort: Pick a preset and threshold, then click Run. We threshold the chosen channel and label connected regions inside each annotation.

reason.noApi: Visualization API isn't reachable from this module. Reload the page; if it keeps failing, the build is missing the visualization-api global bridge.
reason.noActiveVisualization: No visualization is active. Enable a visualization layer first, then re-run.
reason.outOfViewport: {{count}} annotation(s) are off-screen. Pan/zoom to bring them into view; partial overlaps are sampled automatically.
reason.tooSmall: {{count}} annotation(s) are below the 16-pixel minimum after downscaling.
reason.renderFailed: Standalone render failed for {{count}} annotation(s). Try toggling the active visualization off and on; check the browser console for details.
reason.renderEmpty: Standalone render produced no pixels for {{count}} annotation(s).
reason.noSample: Sampler returned no data for {{count}} annotation(s).
reason.noCoverage: {{count}} annotation(s) cover an unpainted region (no tile loaded there, or fully transparent overlay). Nothing to measure.
reason.noBackground: No background image layer is available to sample.
reason.unsupportedShape: {{count}} annotation(s) have a shape this tool can't rasterize (only polygons / rects / ellipses are supported).
reason.unknown: {{count}} annotation(s) failed with no specific reason.

measurements.noPolygon: No polygon-shaped annotations to measure for this scope.
measurements.noPixels: No raster pixels could be sampled.
measurements.componentsHelper: Threshold the chosen channel inside each annotation, then label connected regions.
measurements.perAnnotationEmpty: Run a measurement to populate per-annotation values.
measurements.noResults: No annotations in scope. Draw one, or widen the scope, then Run.
measurements.csvCopied: Table copied to clipboard as CSV.
measurements.compositionEmpty: No annotations fall inside the selected parent.
measurements.tissueHint: Derive an editable tissue outline to use as a ratio / distance target.
measurements.tissueUnavailable: Tissue derivation needs the pathology module (not loaded).
measurements.tissueReady: Tissue mask ready ({{count}} region(s)). Available as a ratio / target below.

presets.emptyState: No classes yet. Use "Add new class" to create one.
